name: Fresh Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups peeled, seeded, and chopped Italian plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large nonreactive skillet over high heat. Add the onions, garlic, salt, and white pepper. Sauté for 3 minutes.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes and basil. Cook, stirring occasionally, for another 3 minutes.
3. Stir in the chicken stock and black pepper. Simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Gradually fold in the butter until it begins to melt. Remove the skillet from the heat and continue stirring until the butter is thoroughly incorporated.
5. Serve immediately or prepare without the butter. Store, refrigerated, in an airtight container for up to 2 days. Reheat in a saucepan over low heat. When the sauce reaches a simmer, fold in the butter and proceed.
